mapper.select: SELECT icp_filing_number FROM blog_settings WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO blog_settings ( user_id, website_chinese_name, website_english_name, website_title, website_create_time, website_intro, logo, favicon, front_head_background, notice, visit_count, icp_filing_number, psb_filing_number, author, author_avatar, author_intro, author_personal_say, user_avatar, tourist_avatar, github, gitee, bilibili, qq, qq_group, wechat, wechat_group, weibo, csdn, zhihu, juejin, twitter, stackoverflow, multi_language, is_comment_review, is_email_notice, wechat_qrcode, alipay_qrcode, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{websiteChineseName}, #{websiteEnglishName}, #{websiteTitle}, #{websiteCreateTime}, #{websiteIntro}, #{logo}, #{favicon}, #{frontHeadBackground}, #{notice}, #{visitCount}, #{icpFilingNumber}, #{psbFilingNumber}, #{author}, #{authorAvatar}, #{authorIntro}, #{authorPersonalSay}, #{userAvatar}, #{touristAvatar}, #{github}, #{gitee}, #{bilibili}, #{qq}, #{qqGroup}, #{wechat}, #{wechatGroup}, #{weibo}, #{csdn}, #{zhihu}, #{juejin}, #{twitter}, #{stackoverflow}, #{multiLanguage}, #{isCommentReview}, #{isEmailNotice}, #{wechatQrCode}, #{alipayQrCode}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update:
UPDATE blog_settings
website_chinese_name = #{websiteChineseName}, website_english_name = #{websiteEnglishName}, website_title = #{websiteTitle}, website_create_time = #{websiteCreateTime}, website_intro = #{websiteIntro},
logo = #{logo}, favicon = #{favicon}, front_head_background = #{frontHeadBackground}, notice = #{notice}, visit_count = #{visitCount},
icp_filing_number = #{icpFilingNumber}, psb_filing_number = #{psbFilingNumber},
author = #{author}, author_avatar = #{authorAvatar}, author_intro = #{authorIntro}, author_personal_say = #{authorPersonalSay},
user_avatar = #{userAvatar}, tourist_avatar = #{touristAvatar},
github = #{github}, gitee = #{gitee}, bilibili = #{bilibili}, qq = #{qq}, qq_group = #{qqGroup}, wechat = #{wechat}, wechat_group = #{wechatGroup},
weibo = #{weibo}, csdn = #{csdn}, zhihu = #{zhihu}, juejin = #{juejin}, twitter = #{twitter}, stackoverflow = #{stackoverflow},
multi_language = #{multiLanguage}, is_comment_review = #{isCommentReview}, is_email_notice = #{isEmailNotice},
wechat_qrcode = #{wechatQrCode}, alipay_qrcode = #{alipayQrCode},
updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE blog_settings SET website_chinese_name = #{websiteChineseName}, website_english_name = #{websiteEnglishName}, website_title = #{websiteTitle}, website_create_time = #{websiteCreateTime}, website_intro = #{websiteIntro}, logo = #{logo}, favicon = #{favicon}, front_head_background = #{frontHeadBackground}, notice = #{notice}, icp_filing_number = #{icpFilingNumber}, psb_filing_number = #{psbFilingNumber}, author = #{author}, author_avatar = #{authorAvatar}, author_intro = #{authorIntro}, author_personal_say = #{authorPersonalSay}, user_avatar = #{userAvatar}, tourist_avatar = #{touristAvatar}, github = #{github}, gitee = #{gitee}, bilibili = #{bilibili}, qq = #{qq}, qq_group = #{qqGroup}, wechat = #{wechat}, wechat_group = #{wechatGroup}, weibo = #{weibo}, csdn = #{csdn}, zhihu = #{zhihu}, juejin = #{juejin}, twitter = #{twitter}, stackoverflow = #{stackoverflow}, multi_language = #{multiLanguage}, is_comment_review = #{isCommentReview}, is_email_notice = #{isEmailNotice}, wechat_qrcode = #{wechatQrCode}, alipay_qrcode = #{alipayQrCode}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
